headline: Elon Musk's Controversial Civil War Prophecy: Is Europe On The Edge?
summary: Elon Musk has been stirring controversy with his repeated predictions of a civil war in Europe.

headline: Target, Ross Stores Expected To Post Higher Revenues As Consumers Stay Resilient: Analysts
summary: Target and Ross Stores expected to have better revenues in Q2 as consumers continue spending despite uncertainties, according to analysts.

headline: Book: Bill Gates' Leadership Instills Fear, Created 'King's Court-Like' Atmosphere At Foundation
summary: A recent book alleges that the leadership style of Bill Gates at his philanthropic foundation has created a climate of fear among its employees.

headline: Apple's Tabletop Robot: The Future Of Home Technology Or A Potential Misstep?
summary: Apple is reportedly in the process of developing a new product: a tabletop robot.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, Tesla, Google, Chipotle — And Chuck Schumer Assures Mark Cuban Of Crypto Regulation
summary:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week. Here’s a look at some of our top stories.



The S&P 500 gained nearly 3.9% this week, marking its best performance since November 2023, while the Nasdaq rose 5.2%, and the Dow advanced 2.9%.

headline: Tesla's Eroding Market Share, Lucid's Rawlinson Claims Bragging Rights, Rivian's Production Woes And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: The week brought to the fore the travails of the startup space in the EV industry, with Rivian facing supply chain issues and Canoo reporting only modest revenue.

headline: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Envisions Future Where Humanoid Robots Can Store Human Memories, Says You 'Won't Be Quite The Same As You Are Today'
summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk on Friday envisioned humans uploading their memories to the cloud and downloading it into a humanoid robot, adding it to a long list of benefits the billionaire entrepreneur sees for the company's humanoid bots called Optimus.

headline: Elon Musk's Biographer Cites Unnamed AI Expert To Note That Tesla Has 'Massive Edge On Bridge Between AI And Physical World' With Its Factories
summary: EV giant Tesla Inc has a massive edge on the bridge between AI and the physical world, thanks to its factories, Elon Musk's biographer Ashlee Vance said on Friday, citing an unnamed AI expert.
